metadata.attribution: Stroke order data (kanji vector graphics) from the KanjiVG project, by Ulrich Apel and contributors, released under CC-BY-SA 3.0. See https://kanjivg.tagaini.net/

field_notes.svg: Filename of the SVG file relative to svg_directory. Null if no stroke order data is available for this character.
field_notes.stroke_count: Stroke count derived from counting <path> elements in the SVG. May differ from KANJIDIC2's stroke_count in edge cases; consumers should prefer KANJIDIC2 for canonical counts.
field_notes.unicode: Unicode codepoint in lowercase hex (the KanjiVG filename stem).

warnings: 109 characters have a KanjiVG stroke count that differs from KANJIDIC2's count (see stroke_count_mismatches below for details). KANJIDIC2 is the canonical source; prefer data/core/kanji.json for stroke counts.
Only 6,416/13,108 (48.9%) characters in our kanji.json have a corresponding KanjiVG SVG. The remaining 6,692 characters are recorded with svg=null and have no stroke order data upstream.
